name: wiglett
flavor_texts: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.
Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.
text: Wiglett is the Garden Eel Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: gooey, rattled, sand-veil (hidden). Base stats — HP: 10, Attack: 55, Defense: 25, Sp. Atk: 35, Sp. Def: 25, Speed: 95. Evolution line: wiglett → wugtrio. Lore: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand. Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.
